textPlain: This is hilariously bad.If you want to see what a real physically sensible double pendulum sim looks like:https://www.myphysicslab.com/pendulum/double-pendulum-en.htm...
Anyone else feel like the pendulum motion seems off?  Maybe the default mass settings are weird, but the movement just does not look physical to me.
There's a "How To Use?" section on the GitHub repo page.https://github.com/theabbie/DoublePendulum?tab=readme-ov-fil...
Yep, it's just bad. Physics feels totally off.
Yes I think the physics is wrong
